originalTitle: Central banks repatriate gold as global insecurity rises
summary: Conflict, sanctions and decline in trust have made the institutions more cautious about storing bullion in other countries
content: Conflict, sanctions and decline in trust have made the institutions more cautious about storing bullion in other countries
chineseTitle: 随着全球不安全局势加剧，各国央行遣返黄金
chineseSummary: 冲突、制裁和信任度下降使得这些机构对在其他国家储存金条更加谨慎
chineseContent: 冲突、制裁和信任度下降使得这些机构对在其他国家储存金条更加谨慎
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
